title: Sooryavanshi
tmdbOverview: A fearless, faithful albeit slightly forgetful Mumbai cop, Veer Sooryavanshi, the chief of the Anti-Terrorism Squad in India pulls out all the stops and stunts to thwart a major conspiracy to attack his city.
synopsis: Sooryavanshi is a 2021 action, crime and thriller film from India. It has a 5.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
